title: Craft Paint Wall Storage
summary: Clean up your ever growing paint collection with this vertical wall hanger.
description: Clean up your ever growing paint collection with this vertical wall hanger. Store your paint brushes & 2 ounce, and 8 ounce paint bottles.

materials.name: Box of Kreg Pocket hole screws (see tools list)

steps.title: Step one
steps.body: Cut your 1/2” material down to 18X40 inches.

steps.title: Step two
steps.body: Make horizontal lines every 3”s starting 2”s from the top until you’ve made 12 lines. Then make vertical intersecting lines every 2”s.

steps.title: Step three
steps.body: Drill 1 3/8” holes where your vertical and horizontal lines intersect.

steps.title: Step four
steps.body: Cutout and then pocket hole 2”X40” body pieces to the back of your storage.

steps.title: Step five
steps.body: Cutout and then pocket hole 2”x17” shelf pieces to the back of your storage.

steps.title: Step six
steps.body: Sand holes and face of storage thoroughly.

steps.title: Step seven
steps.body: Cutout and attach 2”X2” pieces to the face of your storage. One with an 1 1/5” hole in it.

steps.title: Step eight
steps.body: Cut a 2” piece of 3/4” material in half at a 45 degree angle. Mount one piece into your storage and one piece onto the wall so that they match fit each other and the one on the wall holds the storage up.

steps.title: Step nine
steps.body: Hang your storage on the French cleat you made.

steps.title: Step ten
steps.body: Fill your storage up with all of your paints and enjoy!
